description_long: This is a rustic wooden fence composed of uneven, natural-looking wooden posts and rails, giving it a handcrafted and weathered appearance. The fence features two horizontal rails running between vertical posts, with some rails and posts appearing slightly bent or irregular, enhancing its organic, rural character. One section of the fence is broken, with a rail and post lying on the ground, suggesting age or damage. The wood is a medium brown color, with visible grain and texture, and the posts are set at irregular intervals. There are no decorative elements or post caps, and the overall construction is simple and utilitarian. This type of fence is commonly found in parks, gardens, or along rural or suburban pathways.
description: A rustic, weathered wooden fence with two horizontal rails and irregular, natural posts, including a broken section. The fence has a handcrafted, utilitarian look with no decorative features.
description_view_0: The fence is seen from the side, showing its full length, two horizontal rails, and a broken section with a rail and post on the ground.
description_view_1: Viewed from the end, the fence appears as a thin vertical line, with the thickness of the posts and rails barely visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the same length and structure, with the broken section and fallen rail more clearly visible.
description_view_3: From the other end, the fence again appears as a thin vertical line, emphasizing the narrow profile of the posts.
